default.$description: Default border width. Use as the system's standard border weight.

thick.$description: Thick border width. Use for emphasised strokes (focus rings, prominent dividers).

default.$description: Default container max-width. Use as the standard content width for typical pages.

wide.$description: Wide container max-width. Use for content that benefits from more horizontal space on wider screens (e.g. site furniture).

outset.$description: Focus ring outset. Total outward extent of the ring beyond the element edge. Use in size calculations that need to account for the ring (e.g. corner radius on focus states).

default.$description: Default focus ring offset between the focused element and its ring.

lg.$description: Larger focus ring offset. Use on elements where the default offset would feel cramped.

inset.$description: Inset focus ring offset. Use when the ring sits inside the element bounds (e.g. when an outset ring would clip).

width.$description: Focus ring stroke width. Use as the line thickness of the focus indicator.

columns.$description: Grid column count for the standard layout grid.

sm.$description: Small grid gap. Use for compact grids where columns should sit close together.

lg.$description: Large grid gap. Use for spacious grids (marketing layouts, gallery views) where columns benefit from extra breathing room.

minWidth.$description: Minimum width for grid items. Use as the floor below which items shouldn't shrink.

md.$description: Default icon size. Also used for icon-shaped elements (spinners, radios, checkboxes). Pick the step that visually balances surrounding text size and UI scale.

insetRatio.$description: Icon viewBox inset ratio. Use as the multiplier for compensating icon edge inset in layout calculations.

outsetRatio.$description: Icon viewBox outset ratio. Use as the multiplier for compensating icon edge outset in layout calculations.
